prerequisites: An Insightful account with permission to create API tokens.
An Insightful API token, provided via the required api_token field.
A replication start date, provided via the required start_date field, marking the earliest point from which data is synced.

authMethods.name: API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the api_token secret field. The connector sends the Insightful API token in the Authorization header as a Bearer token on each request.

setupSteps.title: Create an Insightful API token
setupSteps.body: In Insightful, create an API token from the in-app API token settings. Copy the generated token value so it can be supplied to the connector.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the token into the required api_token field. The connector uses it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header to authenticate Insightful API requests.

setupSteps.title: Set the replication start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the earliest date from which the connector should pull data. Records before this date are not synced.

sources.title: Get API collections [using Postman] - Insightful Knowledgebase
